title: Add notification_service unit tests for read/unread/delete operations
description: Add notification_service tests for the 5 untested public methods in tests/unit/test_notification_service.py: test_mark_as_read (send 2 notifications, mark one as read, assert unread count==1), test_mark_all_as_read (send 3, mark all, assert unread==0), test_delete_notification (send 1, delete it, assert get returns None), test_get_user_notifications_pagination (send 5, list page_size=3, assert len==3 and total==5), test_get_user_notifications_unread_only (send 3 total, mark 1 read, unread_only=True returns 2). Fixture 'notification_service' creates fresh NotificationService per test.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_notification_service.py -v — all 7 tests pass (existing test_get_unread_count + 5 new + test_send_notification); notification_service uses in-memory storage, no DATABASE_URL; grep 'def test_mark_as_read\|def test_mark_all_as_read\|def test_delete_notification\|def test_get_user_notifications_pagination\|def test_get_user_notifications_unread_only' confirms all 5 new names
